== Notes for [[Item:Q89888|Q89888]] ==

ID: I84735

Name: Lucius Eggius Cornelius Marullus

Given Name: Lucius Eggius Cornelius

Surname: Marullus

Sex: M

_UID: B515504CA3949042B4F9837C8DD101C23C11

Change Date: 11 Aug 2005

Birth: ABT 145

Death: AFT 199

Marriage 1 Cornelia Negrina b: ABT 150

Married:

Children

Lucius Cornelius Cassonius Scipio b: ABT 170

Forrás / Source:

http://wc.rootsweb.ancestry.com/cgi-bin/igm.cgi?op=GET&db=jdp-fam&id=I84735

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
